name: Todo list app
enhancedPrompt: High-performance task management engine built with Tamagui v2, Zustand, and Expo Router. Use YStack lists with Separator components and Moti-inspired enterStyle={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} for fluid task mounting/unmounting. Implement a tactile Bottom Sheet for task creation featuring pressStyle={{ scale: 0.97 }} on all buttons and integrated expo-haptics for physical feedback. Integrate advanced UI elements like Progress bars for daily goals, ToggleGroup for filtering, and Select dropdowns within Dialog overlays. Utilize ThemeInverse sections to highlight high-priority tasks and Toast components for instant completion feedback.

name: Counter with increment and decrement
enhancedPrompt: Create a high-fidelity, tactile Tally Pro application built with Tamagui v2 and Zustand to manage complex counting sessions and historical logs. The UI must feature a centralized YStack dashboard using ZStack for depth, where the main counter utilizes pressStyle={{ scale: 0.95 }} on Feather-icon buttons and triggers expo-haptics on every increment/decrement. Integrate a Tamagui Progress component to visualize real-time progress toward user-defined goals, paired with a Bottom Sheet containing a Select component for switching between different tally categories. Implement fluid motion using enterStyle={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} for history list items and use Toast notifications to alert users when milestones are reached. All state transitions must be managed via a robust Zustand store, ensuring seamless data persistence across Expo Router sessions.

name: Flashcard quiz app
enhancedPrompt: Create a high-performance Spaced Repetition System (SRS) flashcard app using Tamagui v2 and Zustand to manage complex study states and deck progress. The dashboard should utilize `YStack` layouts with `Separator` components, featuring `Tabs` for navigating between active decks and global mastery statistics. Implement an immersive study mode where cards feature `Moti` declarative animations (using `enterStyle={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}`) and `pressStyle={{ scale: 0.97 }}` for a tactile, physical feel, paired with `expo-haptics` for correct/incorrect feedback. Use a `BottomSheet` with snap points for seamless deck management and `Progress` bars to track subject proficiency. Integrate `ThemeInverse` for high-priority "Review Today" sections and use Tamagui `Toast` to provide instant feedback upon session completion.

name: Weather dashboard
enhancedPrompt: Build a hyper-local Weather Intelligence Dashboard using Tamagui v2, featuring high-contrast YStack layouts and ThemeInverse sections for extreme weather alerts. Implement an interactive hourly precipitation timeline via a Slider component and a Select dropdown for seamless unit switching between Metric and Imperial. Every weather card must feature tactile pressStyle={{ scale: 0.97 }} and fluid enterStyle={{ opacity: 0, y: 15 }} animations to ensure a premium feel. Integrate a Bottom Sheet with snap points for managing saved locations, paired with expo-haptics on every interaction and Toast notifications for real-time alerts. Use Zustand for ultra-fast state synchronization of live meteorological data across the Expo Router navigation structure.
